_meta.description: Canonical XML templates for KM built-in action types, captured from Keyboard Maestro's own editor via Edit > Insert Action > By Name. Each entry's `xml` is the action's <dict> body with transient keys (ActionUID, creation dates) stripped. `parameter_paths` maps user-facing parameter names (snake_case) to the plist keys inside the captured template, so the substitution engine doesn't need per-action knowledge of KM's plist schema.
